sessions.lever: MODEL VALIDATED + ground truth harvested. (1) Probe t1 (tmp/probe_mar.py): tbl+1 chain-extender on the D_800F19C0 store moved tbl s6->s5 (target reg) at identical insn count (141) — first of six rotation slots proven byte-free. (2) Tie-break verified in global.c source (double-truncate, allocno-ascending fallback). (3) reg_n_refs is += loop_depth; goto-loops don't raise depth. (4) Target bytes read: full register map confirmed (status s0, saved s1); poll C-shape CORRECT as-is; the masked-56 lives in the TAIL — a second local-alloc cascade (check->a2 = the body pin's purpose; src/i/b roles rotated) + the check2 lbu-then-andi-0xff micro-shape. Budget interaction found: tbl needs its 2nd ref before idx_1495's +2 (555 would beat a +1-only tbl at 540); t2 candidate = csmd4-style idx_1494-init chain via tbl.

sessions.lever: SESSION 2 — t3 STRUCTURAL DISCOVERY: reshaping both copy arms to target's byte order (dst = a1; src = (u8*)&...; if (dst != 0) {copy}) lands FIVE of eight registers with ZERO coercion (saved=s1, i1494=s2, i1496=s3, arg1=s4, p81=s0; insns 140; arg1 pri drops to 365 matching byte evidence — arm 1 currently tests a1 first, inconsistent with arm 2; target 71A48/71A8C prove move-then-la-then-beqz both arms). REFUTED: t5/t6 late-site chain-extenders materialize +6 insns (combine folds only ADJACENT to the base def); t4 (t3+t1) overshoots tbl to s4. KEY NEGATIVE RESULT: the remaining trio {arg0->s7, tbl->s5, i1495->s6} is UNREACHABLE by the priority formula (target's i1495 has the same 2 refs) => find_reg conflicts/preferences decide it; next lever = instrumented cc1 (tmp/gccdbg) find_reg walk at the t3 base.

sessions.lever: SESSION 3 — check-mask mechanics CRACKED + 6/8 registers (probe u7). The target's two `andi $a2-class,$v0,0xFF` sites come from the sibling's opaque-constant idiom (the vestigial undeclared `new_var = 0xFF;` at :555 IS the original's construct; csmd4's 443/470 twin is byte-proven). Fold rules established: literal &0xFF folds in the FRONT END; opaque-const mask + same-block set -> cse eats it; cross-block set + SINGLE use -> combine folds to andi IMMEDIATE and consumes the set (byte-free); multi-use -> register-and (bad). Two single-use constants (new_var + new_var3) give both sites (u6). u7 (u6 + t3 arm-reshape) = 6/8 regs (saved s1, i1494 s2, i1496 s3, arg1 s4, status s0) but mask #2 regresses to register-and (combine fragility vs arm shape). Remaining grid in notes.md Session-3.
